flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Virginia's College at Wise fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Virginia's College at Wise rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (39.0% → 47.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Virginia's College at Wise rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (60.0% → 71.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Virginia's College at Wise fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.4k → $16.8k).
